rationale: This task involves precise structural manipulation within a well-defined platform architecture document. The edit is realistic because maintainers often move a canonical subsection to a more appropriate ownership area while preserving its code fence, notes, and surrounding sections exactly.
risks: Agents may choose the similarly named `### Database Tables` or `### Database Schema Exceptions` subsection instead of the target `### Database Schema` subsection.
Agents may miss the exact subsection boundary around the SQL fenced block and bullet list.
Agents may accidentally modify the fenced archive note that mentions `### Database Schema` literally.
review_notes: The raw reviewer response labeled reviewer_model as `AI Coding Agent`; this artifact records the actual local reviewer model used.
This review was completed before any mdtools, hybrid, or unix measurement for C-T10-33.
